title: PreFer narrow llama.cpp router client contract

promised: POST /v1/chat/completions SSE streaming chunks terminated by data: [DONE]
OpenAI nested json_schema request form used by Ground Control
conditional OpenAI function-tool call envelope and role=tool result message
versioned configured model identities plus measured router/discovery identifiers and aliases listed in this fixture
OpenAI-shaped error envelope for rejected contract requests
not_promised: parallel tool calls or tool-choice quality
server-side cancellation after a client closes a stream
exact HTTP error codes, error messages, timing extensions, or router metadata

required_response.data: array of objects containing a non-empty string id

structured_output.response_rule: choices[0].message.content is a JSON string that validates against the supplied schema
structured_output.semantic_rule: schema validity and semantic anomaly classification are separate results

tools.request: OpenAI tools array with function definitions; tool result messages use role=tool and tool_call_id
tools.response: When a model emits tool_calls, each call has id, type=function, function.name, and JSON-string function.arguments
not_promised: that a model chooses a tool

errors_and_limits.timeout: The harness always applies a client deadline and records timeout; PreFer does not promise a server deadline.
errors_and_limits.cancellation: The harness closes the client SSE connection and records bounded return; backend work cancellation is not promised.
errors_and_limits.request_size: PreFer configures no stable byte limit. The harness caps generated payloads for safety and records backend rejection if tested.
errors_and_limits.context_limit: Context limits are preset/model dimensions. Unsupported or unrun 8K/32K/128K cells are explicit skipped or unsupported results.

model_identity_rule: canonical_id is the configured cross-system/preset identity. On b9843, discovery_id is the normalized ID returned by /v1/models and accepted for routing; listed aliases are also accepted. When canonical_id and discovery_id differ, canonical_id is not promised as a PreFer request route.
